mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (message_id, product_id, sender_student_id, receiver_student_id, content, parent_message_id, is_read) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{productId}, #{senderStudentId}, #{receiverStudentId}, #{content}, #{parentMessageId}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, s.username as sender_username, r.username as receiver_username, p.product_name FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users s ON m.sender_student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN users r ON m.receiver_student_id = r.student_id LEFT JOIN products p ON m.product_id = p.product_id WHERE m.message_id = #{messageId}

SELECT m.*, s.username as sender_username, r.username as receiver_username, p.product_name FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users s ON m.sender_student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN users r ON m.receiver_student_id = r.student_id LEFT JOIN products p ON m.product_id = p.product_id WHERE m.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC

SELECT m.*, s.username as sender_username, r.username as receiver_username, p.product_name FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users s ON m.sender_student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN users r ON m.receiver_student_id = r.student_id LEFT JOIN products p ON m.product_id = p.product_id WHERE m.receiver_student_id = #{receiverStudentId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.*, s.username as sender_username, r.username as receiver_username, p.product_name FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users s ON m.sender_student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN users r ON m.receiver_student_id = r.student_id LEFT JOIN products p ON m.product_id = p.product_id WHERE m.sender_student_id = #{senderStudentId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE messages SET is_read = 1 WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE receiver_student_id = #{receiverStudentId} AND is_read = 0
